name: Evergreen SA
summary: Evergreen SA provides solutions for the production and distribution of digital content in Europe, the Middle East, Africa, and the Americas. It offers point to point encoding and streaming links, such as on-the-go portable outside broadcast encoders and studio to transmitters links; audio-over-IP solution for broadcasting, on air in-studio production, radio program transmission, and public transportation; and production and sound cards. The company also provides professional, support and maintenance contract, software development tool, and product support services. It offers its products to journalists, broadcasters, and industrialists. The company was formerly known as Digigram S.A. and changed its name to Evergreen SA in June 2020. Evergreen SA was founded in 1985 and is based in Paris, France. As of March 10, 2020, Evergreen SA operates as a subsidiary of Evergreen Holding.
